source: Implementation role mapping built ONLY from this repository's verified tokens. The official DGA charts page (https://design.dga.gov.sa/guidelines/components/data-display/charts) was partially extracted and exposed no chart color tokens/palette; see references/29-data-visualization-and-charts.md.
notes: These are implementation ROLE MAPPINGS using verified tokens — NOT official DGA chart tokens unless the official charts page or Figma library confirms them.
Every hex below is copied from tokens/colors-v1.0.json. No chart colors are invented.
Do not add unverified chart colors. For more than two series, prefer encodings beyond color (labels, patterns, direct value labels) rather than inventing a palette.
Use IBM Plex Sans Arabic (typography tokens) for chart titles/labels; never rely on color alone.
